column1: # Debris cloud designed to exercise the Analysis-tab event views.
# All offsets are in ICRF (delta over the apolunio state in input.toml).
# The base orbit (zero deltas) already crashes near the south pole;
# the per-case deltas spread fragments out in longitude (dv_x cross-
# track) and in time (dv_z in-track / energy)
# given enough extra energy that their perilunio sits above 1737.4 km
# and they survive the 3 h window.
#   id        : case name; per-case output files use it as a suffix

column2: am_srp: passed through to debris.Cr / debris.am_srp
